name: @ai-chat-interface/mcp-linux-frontend
description: Frontend bundle for MCP Linux status pages (TypeScript + Rolldown).

scripts.build: rolldown src/status/status-page.ts --format iife --file ../public/js/status.js && rolldown src/status/workspace-page.ts --format iife --file ../public/js/workspace-status.js && rolldown src/upload/upload-page.ts --format iife --file ../public/js/upload.js
scripts.build:watch: rolldown src/status/status-page.ts --format iife --watch --file ../public/js/status.js & rolldown src/status/workspace-page.ts --format iife --watch --file ../public/js/workspace-status.js & rolldown src/upload/upload-page.ts --format iife --watch --file ../public/js/upload.js
